text: A busy street scene in an urban area, likely India. The street is lined with multi-story buildings. On the left, there are several auto-rickshaws and a motorcycle. On the right, there is a gas station with a blue and yellow canopy. Above the gas station, a large billboard displays two women and the text 'K.C. CHANDLER'. A pedestrian crossing is visible in the foreground, and a man in a pink shirt is walking across it.
